note: Onboarding scope = LiFiDiamond user-facing bridge+swap surface (Ethereum mainnet). The diamond is the single user entry (users sign tx to it); its 49 facet implementations are delegatecall targets behind it, NOT separately user-callable -> their function surface is gated via the diamond merged-ABI snapshot (lifi-diamond.abi.json), not listed as separate contracts. LiFiDEXAggregator is a SEPARATE periphery contract (own address, command-stream processRoute) -> separate onboarding (deferred). Fee/Receiver/Executor periphery = destination-side / infra, not source pre-sign.

contracts.name: LiFiDiamond (EIP-2535)
contracts.reason: sole user-facing entry; 105,012 fn-tx/30d across 51 active bridge+swap selectors (Dune q7665132)

deferred_periphery_note: LiFiDEXAggregator (separate swap-aggregator periphery contract, command-stream processRoute, own address != diamond) is a separate-onboarding follow-up; its mainnet address is not asserted here (not 1st-party-verified this session). Fee/Receiver/Executor periphery = destination-side/infra, out of source pre-sign scope.

facets_provenance.loupe: facets() eth_call on diamond; all 49 facet impls Etherscan-verified (getabi); merged into lifi-diamond.abi.json
